title: Ireland is concerned if Donald Trump imposes swingeing import tariffs and cuts the US corporate tax rate
text:
Ireland is concerned if Donald Trump imposes swingeing import tariffs and cuts the US corporate tax rate
- MANDEL NGAN
- Updated
[0](/news/national/ireland-is-concerned-if-donald-trump-imposes-swingeing-import-tariffs-and-cuts-the-us-corporate/image_34998ddc-a303-5e02-8d95-6954d07f3f63.html#comments)
Tags
As featured on
With a general election next week, Ireland and its 5.4 million inhabitants fear finding themselves in the eye of a protectionist storm promised by incoming US president Donald Trump.
